_comment: Binds the committed confidential SP1 guest ELF (elf/cxfer-guest — the complete gen-1 op set plus OP_SWAP) to the program vkey it must be deployed with. verify-vkey-pin.sh asserts sha256(elf/cxfer-guest) == elf_sha256 on every PR, and (on the prover host) that the vkey derived from this ELF == program_vkey. A guest rebuild that changes the ELF MUST regenerate the vkey and update this file IN THE SAME COMMIT, then redeploy ConfidentialPool with the new PROGRAM_VKEY (it is immutable) — otherwise every settle reverts. program_vkey is the key a REAL Groth16 proof of THIS ELF verifies against on-chain (test/ConfidentialSwapProofReal.t.sol).
guest_state: Complete gen-1 op set (OP_WRAP/TRANSFER/UNWRAP/BRIDGE_BURN/BRIDGE_MINT/ATTEST_META) + OP_SWAP (confidential AMM batch against public pool reserves). OP_SWAP binds each intent's amount to its secp note with a direct secp Pedersen opening (not an in-guest BabyJubJub commitment) — ~513K cycles/intent (the BJJ+sigma binding was ~6.06B and is unnecessary while amounts are cleartext to the prover). PublicValues gains SwapSettlement[] swaps (poolId + pre/post reserves), matching ConfidentialPool. Built via `cargo prove build` on the prover host; the vkey derived from this ELF (exec-swap.rs MODE=execute prints VKEY) == program_vkey, and a real Groth16 of it verifies on-chain at program_vkey. bitcoin_relay_vkey is the reflection prover (test/ConfidentialReflectionProofReal.t.sol); set BITCOIN_RELAY_VKEY to it once the worker produces reflection proofs continuously.
